scores.notes: Excellent response. Uses event.workload correctly, add_layer with combine=True, replan(), self.model.config, relation.data[relation.app], override:replace, HTTP check with url field. Extra correct details (backoff-delay, backoff-limit, period, threshold, on-failure) are all valid Pebble fields. Uses ops.pebble.LayerDict type annotation and ops.pebble.Layer constructor — both valid. Uses on-failure:restart rather than gold standard's on-check-failure, but on-failure is a real Pebble field. Graceful waiting pattern and helper decomposition are good practice, not hallucinations.
